name: Curry in a Hurry
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Red chili powder or cayenne pepper
recipeInstructions:
If using shrimp, clean and devein. Saute them lightly on both sides until they become pinkish, then set aside.
If using chicken, cut the meat into 1-inch strips and set aside.
In a saucepan or wok, heat the oil and fry the curry powder and red chili powder rapidly for 30 seconds.
Add the garlic and stir quickly. Then add the tomatoes, ginger (if desired), and salt; mix well and bring to a boil.
Add the chicken or shrimp, and simmer until cooked (3-5 minutes for shrimp, 6-10 minutes for chicken).
Finally, reduce the heat and let the dish gently simmer until the oil floats to the surface for about a minute.
Adjust the flavor with optional heavy cream if needed. Garnish with freshly chopped coriander and lemon juice.
Serves 2 as a main dish, or 3-4 when served with other dishes.
